caption: A woman is seated at a desk in an office setting, wearing a black cardigan over a pink top and blue pants, with a white face mask and an identification badge around her neck. She is holding a phone to her ear with her left hand while writing on a document with her right hand. In front of her are a computer monitor and various papers. The back of another person's silver-haired head is visible in the foreground. The scene remains mostly static across the sequence, showing the woman continuing her phone conversation and writing. On-screen text includes a purple circular icon with a silhouette and the words "Day 2" and the phrase "Sim Week" accompanied by a small bar graph icon in the lower right corner of each frame.
